content: Let me invite you to our Semantics and compositionality for expressiveness and complexity, whose goal is to bring together researchers who use categorical, topological and algebraic methods in the study of automata and finite model theory. Details here: https://tomas.jakl.one/events/esslli-2026-workshop

I forgot to add:

  • The invited speakers are Samson Abramsky and Jiri Adamek (and one more to be announced soon)
  • Workshop dates: 10-14 August 2026
  • Location: Prague
  • Abstract deadlines: 30 April (can be flexible, ask)
